name: Carrotroot Vestments
description: Notes This robe has the same stats as the T13 Robe of the Star Mother plus a 30 Max HP, making it a direct upgrade. It does however have 1% less XP Bonus.
effects: Secret Power: On ability use, consume 1/4th of your easter-magic meter to activate a secret power! Ovipositor Surprise: Release a flurry of vulnerability inducing eggs on your foes for 3 seconds! Damage: 35-50 (42.5) Range: 8.55 Secret Power Cooldown: 30 seconds Targets receive 108% damage for 3 seconds after being hit Ignores defense of target Shots hit multiple targets Shots pass through obstacles
